_README: Medical / physician-practice broker source registry. Mirrors the optometry TOM rig and dental TDPM broker_codes.json pattern. site_prefix TMM = The Medical (Practice) Market (feeds themedicalpracticemarket.com + a medicalpractice sibling if built). NEVER collides with dental's TDPM-, veterinary's TVM-, accounting's TAM-, or optometry's TOM-. 'ref_prefix' is the source-scoped broker reference shown muted on cards. 'aggregator: true' sources are treated like the blocked aggregators and purged by the normalizer.

rejected_sources._note: Verified live but NOT used, with the honest reason. Documented so a future pass doesn't re-litigate them.
rejected_sources.americanhealthcarecapital: Real primary M&A advisor with ~10 public deals, BUT they are PE/platform-scale ($5M+ EBITDA, roll-ups) and location is mostly 'Not Disclosed'. A location-first practice marketplace can't place them on a state map. Revisit if we add a 'platform deals' tier.
rejected_sources.vertess: Healthcare M&A advisor; 404s / bot-blocks a plain HTTP fetch (JS-rendered), region-only teasers, platform-scale. Needs a headless browser for little yield. Skip.
rejected_sources.practicetransitionsgroup: Primary broker BUT mostly DENTAL; only ~7 medical/med-spa of ~19. Revisit if we widen the medical scope or spin a med-spa sub-niche skin.
rejected_sources.medicalpracticelistings: medicalpracticelistings.com is a parked/for-sale domain (redirects to Afternic). Not a live source. Use strategicmedicalbrokers.com instead.
rejected_sources.firstmedtransitions: 1st Med Transitions — real broker but its MEDICAL page is ~empty (1 active); its volume is dental. Skip for medical.
rejected_sources.transitionconsultants: transitionconsultants.com — ~4 active medical; its long archive is mostly SOLD/off-market. Too thin to justify a module.
rejected_sources.carrhealthcare: CARR is healthcare COMMERCIAL REAL ESTATE (tenant/buyer rep) — does not list practices-as-businesses. Exclude.
